docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ATANASIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEROME, DON $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $3.06 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $153.06, IF DEFT RETURNS PLTF'S REFRIGERATOR TO PLTF OR HIS AGENT W/IN 10 DAYS JUDGMT TO BE REDUCED TO $110 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
